query:
SELECT 'account_credits' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM account_credits UNION ALL
SELECT 'account_suspensions', COUNT(*) FROM account_suspensions UNION ALL
SELECT 'activity_events', COUNT(*) FROM activity_events UNION ALL
SELECT 'audit_log', COUNT(*) FROM audit_log UNION ALL
SELECT 'companies', COUNT(*) FROM companies UNION ALL
SELECT 'company_payment_methods', COUNT(*) FROM company_payment_methods UNION ALL
SELECT 'company_promo_redemptions', COUNT(*) FROM company_promo_redemptions UNION ALL
SELECT 'company_settings', COUNT(*) FROM company_settings UNION ALL
SELECT 'contractor_companies', COUNT(*) FROM contractor_companies UNION ALL
SELECT 'contractor_invites', COUNT(*) FROM contractor_invites UNION ALL
SELECT 'contractor_profiles', COUNT(*) FROM contractor_profiles UNION ALL
SELECT 'contractor_ratings', COUNT(*) FROM contractor_ratings UNION ALL
SELECT 'dismissed_announcements', COUNT(*) FROM dismissed_announcements UNION ALL
SELECT 'feature_flags', COUNT(*) FROM feature_flags UNION ALL
SELECT 'integration_connectors', COUNT(*) FROM integration_connectors UNION ALL
SELECT 'job_change_history', COUNT(*) FROM job_change_history UNION ALL
SELECT 'job_comments', COUNT(*) FROM job_comments UNION ALL
SELECT 'location_pings', COUNT(*) FROM location_pings UNION ALL
SELECT 'maintenance_mode', COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_mode UNION ALL
SELECT 'maintenance_requests', COUNT(*) FROM maintenance_requests UNION ALL
SELECT 'notifications', COUNT(*) FROM notifications UNION ALL
SELECT 'parts_receipts', COUNT(*) FROM parts_receipts UNION ALL
SELECT 'password_reset_tokens', COUNT(*) FROM password_reset_tokens UNION ALL
SELECT 'platform_announcements', COUNT(*) FROM platform_announcements UNION ALL
SELECT 'platform_settings', COUNT(*) FROM platform_settings UNION ALL
SELECT 'pms_integrations', COUNT(*) FROM pms_integrations UNION ALL
SELECT 'pms_webhook_events', COUNT(*) FROM pms_webhook_events UNION ALL
SELECT 'payout_holds', COUNT(*) FROM payout_holds UNION ALL
SELECT 'promo_codes', COUNT(*) FROM promo_codes UNION ALL
SELECT 'properties', COUNT(*) FROM properties UNION ALL
SELECT 'property_units', COUNT(*) FROM property_units UNION ALL
SELECT 'skill_tiers', COUNT(*) FROM skill_tiers UNION ALL
SELECT 'subscription_plans', COUNT(*) FROM subscription_plans UNION ALL
SELECT 'time_sessions', COUNT(*) FROM time_sessions UNION ALL
SELECT 'transactions', COUNT(*) FROM transactions UNION ALL
SELECT 'users', COUNT(*) FROM users
ORDER BY tbl;
